title: Full-Stack Engineer (React, TypeScript, Azure Integration)
description: We are looking for a Full-Stack Engineer (Frontend-leaning) who can take generated React applications and turn them into secure, production-ready products. You will: Refactor and enhance Loveable-generated React code Integrate applications with our Azure-based APIs and Dataverse backends Implement authentication and secure API communication Prepare applications for CI/CD pipelines and client deployments Support deployment into both our Azure tenant and client Azure tenants This is a product-focused engineering role, not a design-only role. 🛠 Key Responsibilities Modify and productionise React / Next.js applications Replace mock endpoints with live Azure APIs Implement secure authentication flows (OAuth2 / Entra ID / JWT) Manage environment configuration (Dev / Test / Prod) Work with Azure DevOps or GitHub Actions for CI/CD Collaborate with automation engineers to surface backend processes in UI Ensure performance, security, and scalability best practices Support deployments into client Azure tenants ✅ Required Skills & Experience Strong experience with React (v18+) Experience with Next.js Strong proficiency in TypeScript Experience integrating with REST APIs Understanding of authentication flows (OAuth2, JWT, MSAL) Experience managing environment variables and multi-environment builds Familiarity with Azure App Service or similar hosting platforms Understanding of production-grade frontend architecture ⭐ Highly Desirable Experience with Azure Functions Experience with Entra ID (Azure AD) Experience with CI/CD pipelines (Azure DevOps or GitHub Actions) Experience deploying applications into multiple Azure tenants Familiarity with Power Platform / Dataverse APIs Experience with Tailwind CSS or modern UI component libraries 🧠 What We’re Looking For Someone comfortable working with generated code and improving it Strong problem solver with clean architectural thinking Security-conscious engineer Able to work independently in a remote environment Comfortable operating in a product-building environment rather than agency-style delivery

title: Sr Full-Stack Developer – Gamified SaaS, Referral System, High-Conversion UI, SMS/Email Automation
description: Senior Front-End Content Funnel Developer (SaaS / High Conversion / Landing Pages + Social Ads)(subscription offering presentations. Overview We are building a national sweepstakes SaaS platform that allows creators to launch compliant $5,000 sweepstakes and monetize their audience. We are looking for a conversion-focused Front-End Funnel Developer who can study and replicate the highest-performing subscription models and landing structures (Amazon, Shopify, Google Fi) and adapt those principles into our platform. Skill stack REQUIRED (non-negotiable) Your hire must understand: 1. Conversion UI (CRITICAL) Knows how to design flows that drive action Not just “make it pretty” Think: progress bars checklists CTA placement friction reduction 2. Gamification systems Like: entries rewards unlocks referrals Similar thinking to: Duolingo DraftKings 3. Event-based backend logic They must think like: user signs up → trigger SMS invites friend → unlock reward buys merch → increase entries 4. Automation (SMS + Email) Tools mindset: Twilio SendGrid Postmark If they’ve NEVER worked with these: big risk What their past work MUST include Ask for examples of: SaaS dashboards onboarding flows referral systems subscription systems CRM or automation tools Who to AVOID Reject instantly if they are: “WordPress expert” “Shopify developer only” “Mobile app developer only” “UI/UX designer only” These will slow you down massively JOB POST Title: Build Gamified User Dashboard + Referral + SMS Automation High Conversion Focus Description: We are building a platform similar to a mix of: giveaways referral systems merch monetization SMS/email engagement We need a developer who understands: conversion-focused UI gamification systems progress, rewards, unlocks event-based backend logic SMS + email automation This is NOT a basic dev job. You will be building: user onboarding flow progress dashboard like a checklist system referral tracking system reward unlock logic SMS/email triggers You MUST have experience with: SaaS dashboards referral or reward systems automation triggers events → actions APIs like Twilio / SendGrid It’s a structured relationship + engagement system. That’s exactly what you’re trying to build with: creators + fans merchants + customers referrals + rewards What they do REALLY well you should use 1. Structured journeys Mentorloop doesn’t just connect people. It creates: onboarding flows guided interactions progress tracking Nothing is random. 2. Built-in engagement loops They keep users active with: nudges reminders milestones You need this for: entrants creators merchants 3. Clean dashboard clarity Everything revolves around: what do I do next Your current risk: Users enter your platform and go: Now what How this applies DIRECTLY to 50fifty.win You’re not building: a giveaway tool You’re building: a behavior engine Your version Earnings Journey User sees: Step 1: Enter giveaway +1 entry Step 2: Verify phone +5 entries Step 3: Invite 3 friends +10 entries Step 4: Buy merch +20 entries Step 5: Share your link unlimited entries This = gamified progression system You do this for money + rewards status leaderboard What a STRONG candidate will show Look for past work like: CRM systems SaaS dashboards Referral platforms Subscription platforms Marketplaces The killer question Send this to EVERY applicant: If we want users to invite 3 friends to unlock more entries, how would you design both the backend logic and frontend experience Weak answer: We can add a referral feature Strong answer: Each user gets a unique referral ID, we track successful conversions, trigger rewards at thresholds, and reflect progress in a dashboard with real-time updates That’s your hire Scoring system Rate each dev 1–5: UX thinking Do they guide users Systems Logic over visuals Dashboards Clear + actionable Events Trigger-based thinking Communication Clear + structured Anyone below 4 skip Reality check Most Upwork devs: Can build features Cannot build behavior systems You need: someone who builds user flows that drive money This is NOT a graphic design-only role. You are managing back end programmer to implement front end presentation and create video and still ads targeting creators and individuals to incentivize viewer to comment, subscribe, share, or purchase to receive entries to win sweepstakes prizes or promote their own sweepstakes and make money selling entries on YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Rumble, etc. This is a revenue-driving role focused on conversion, funnels, and growth execution. Core Objective Your task is to: Analyze and replicate high-converting SaaS/subscription structures Amazon, Shopify, Google Fi style Build high-converting landing pages and pricing funnels Create social media ad landing variations Design onboarding flows Help produce tutorial and walkthrough experiences Responsibilities 1. Landing Page and Funnel Development Build mobile-first SaaS landing pages Structure pricing tiers clearly Implement strong CTA hierarchy Reduce friction in onboarding Integrate Stripe checkout and subscriptions Optimize page speed 2. Conversion and Optimization Implement A/B testing structure Improve bounce rate and engagement Structure upgrade pages Optimize for TikTok, Meta, YouTube traffic 3. Social Media Ad Support Create landing page variants Design micro landing pages Structure ad hooks Assist ad creative layouts 4. Tutorial and Support Experience Build onboarding tutorial flows Create support pages Design dashboard walkthroughs Structure FAQ Required Skills Strong HTML5 CSS3 JavaScript React, Next.js or modern framework Experience with SaaS subscription funnels Stripe integration Conversion psychology understanding Mobile-first design Landing page optimization Preferred Experience Studied high-performing subscription flows Built onboarding funnels like Shopify or Amazon SaaS growth or creator platforms Ad landing pages for TikTok or Meta What We Care About Conversion rate Clean pricing presentation Funnel clarity Fast loading Clear messaging We do NOT care about: Overdesigned visuals Fancy animations Agency fluff Project Scope Phase 1 Homepage Creator signup funnel Subscription pricing page Upgrade page Ad landing pages FAQ page Thank-you page Basic dashboard UI Onboarding flow To Apply Please include: 1. 3 SaaS landing pages you built 2. Example subscription funnel 3. Frameworks you use 4. Availability 5. Answer: How would you structure a SaaS landing page to maximize paid traffic conversion Important: Begin your proposal with the word Conversion Budget Performance-based bonus possible. Long term available if you have ad management and social skills Performance-based bonus possible. Long term available if you had ad management and social skills

title: Full-Stack Funnel Engineer (long-term role)
description: Full-Stack Funnel Builder & Conversion Tracking Owner Long-Term | Mission-Driven | Remote We are building the most trusted productivity platform for people with ADHD. We already reach millions of people across YouTube, Instagram and webinars. Now we’re scaling the backend — and we need someone who can own the machine. This is NOT a copywriting role. This is NOT a short-term freelance gig. This is a technical growth role for someone who understands funnels, automation, tracking, and data — and wants to build something meaningful long-term. 🚨 Important: You Must Have ADHD or a strong personal connection to ADHD This is non-negotiable. We help ADHDers build focus and confidence without medication. We want someone who deeply understands the audience because you are the audience. Why This Role Exists Right now we have: • Webinar funnels • VSL funnels • Quiz funnels (Heyflow) • ActiveCampaign automations • ClickFunnels pages • Zapier integrations • Meta + YouTube + Google Ads • Skool community • Payment processors • Tracking pixels What we don’t have yet is: A technical owner of the entire system. We need someone who can think like a systems architect, not just a task executor. Someone who sees messy stacks and thinks: “This can be cleaner. This can convert better. This tracking is broken. We’re losing data here.” What You Will Own You will become the technical backbone of our funnel ecosystem. Your responsibilities: Funnel Infrastructure • Build & optimize funnels in ClickFunnels • Improve page logic, flows, and structure • Implement A/B testing • Maintain evergreen + launch funnels Automation & CRM • Build and maintain complex ActiveCampaign tagging & automations • Create and optimize Zapier workflows • Ensure clean segmentation and lifecycle flows Conversion Tracking & Data • Set up and maintain Meta, Google, and YouTube tracking • Configure pixel events correctly (custom events, deduplication, etc.) • Debug broken tracking • Improve attribution accuracy • Understand UTMs and cross-platform data flow Tool Integrations • Connect webinars, payments, CRM, Skool, ad platforms • Ensure data flows properly across systems • Prevent silent failures Technical Implementation • Light HTML/CSS tweaks • Basic JS understanding • Troubleshoot when things inevitably break You will work directly with the founder and marketing team. This is long-term infrastructure building — not one-off tasks. Who This Is Perfect For You: • Have ADHD and understand how ADHD brains behave • Love systems, automation and clean workflows • Get satisfaction from fixing messy setups • Think in funnels and user journeys • Understand conversion logic • Care about tracking accuracy • Prefer ownership over being micromanaged • Want to grow with a company over years You probably enjoy solving problems like: “Why is ROAS off?” “Why are these events not firing?” “Why are leads not tagging correctly?” “Why is this funnel leaking?” Required Experience (Strong) You must have hands-on experience with most of: • ClickFunnels • ActiveCampaign (advanced tagging + automations) • Zapier • Meta pixel + conversion API • Google Tag Manager or equivalent • YouTube conversion tracking • Multi-tool integrations • Funnel A/B testing • UTM tracking logic This is not entry-level. Strong Bonus • Heyflow / quiz funnels • Webinar funnels (evergreen + launch) • Membership/community platforms • Info-product or coaching businesses • Lifecycle marketing • Attribution modeling basics Work Setup • Long-term collaboration • 20–40 hours per month to start • Monthly retainer preferred • Fully remote • Async-friendly • Direct founder collaboration This role can evolve into Head of Growth Infrastructure. Budget $40–70/hour equivalent (retainer-based). Higher possible for exceptional candidates. How To Apply Start your application with: “Focus Architect” In your message include: Your ADHD story (briefly) Funnels you’ve built (links if possible) Automations you’ve architected Tracking setups you’ve implemented A system you fixed that was messy Why long-term mission-driven work matters to you We read every serious application carefully. We are not building just another funnel. We are building the growth engine behind helping 1 million ADHDers win. If that excites you — apply 💙

title: Full Stack Website Development Team
description: We are hiring a small WordPress development team to own and manage our web infrastructure across corporate and franchise websites. Hours will begin at 10 to 20 per week combined and increase as we grow. This is a long term engagement. Your team will be responsible for keeping all sites live, fast, secure, and fully integrated with our CRM and marketing systems. If a site goes down, you respond immediately. If lead routing breaks, you fix it without delay. You will manage hosting, uptime monitoring, performance optimization, WordPress maintenance, updates, and security across multiple properties. You will build and launch franchise microsites and landing pages, execute ongoing web design improvements, and optimize for conversions. You must have deep experience with Gravity Forms, including routing logic, validation, and testing, as well as strong experience integrating CRMs and marketing automation platforms through APIs and webhooks. You will diagnose and resolve sync failures, duplicate leads, and attribution issues while maintaining data integrity. Occasional custom development and plugin customization will be required. We are not looking for task takers. We want a team that takes full ownership of infrastructure and protects lead flow. Apply with examples of multi site environments you currently manage and explain how you monitor performance, prevent downtime, and eliminate lead loss.

description: We are building a premium logistics platform for touring singers and high-mobility professionals. We have the figma design ready for mobile app. The app will allow users to: View and manage flights Track hotels and accommodations Access event and gig details Manage schedules in one unified timeline Keep critical travel and event information centralized This is not a basic travel tracker. It is a professional logistics system for people who move constantly and depend on precision. We are looking for an experienced development team to execute this at production quality. Phase 1 (First 30 Days) iOS app only Production-ready build Clean, premium UI Real-time backend architecture ready for future expansion The iOS app must be fast, scalable, and architected properly from day one to support multi-platform expansion. Phase 2 (After iOS Launch) Web app macOS desktop app Windows desktop app Android app All platforms must remain fully synchronized in real time. Core Requirements Scalable backend infrastructure Real-time data synchronization Secure authentication Clean and modern UI Production-grade deployment Architecture designed for cross-platform expansion Ideal Team Experience We are looking for a team experienced in: Real-time systems Mobile-first product development Cloud backend architecture High-performance mobile apps Scalable infrastructure
